entry_transition.notes: Player crosses threshold from jungle twilight into temple interior — camera pushes upward slightly as perspective shifts from exterior doorway to interior chamber, maintaining ground-POV but revealing altar space above/ahead. Lighting transitions from dim exterior glow to stone chamber ambience with altar focal point.

exit_handoff.leaves_on: Player's hand closing around chosen treasure (A/B/C) in sharp, decisive grab. Body already pivoting toward exit, weight shifting into sprint stance. Guards' voices audible off-screen (rising urgency). Altar still visible but blurring as motion begins — treasure now clutched, mission accomplished but escape imminent.
exit_handoff.next_scene_should_open_with: Mid-sprint or already in motion — player fleeing temple interior toward exit/jungle. Chosen treasure visible in hand (carry-over asset). Pursuit sounds louder, lighting may shift back toward exterior (reverse of entry). High kinetic energy, no hesitation.

mood_arc: Tense stillness (entry into silent temple) escalates to split-second decision urgency (guards approaching) culminating in decisive action (grab-and-pivot). Silence breaks into chaos.
visual_callbacks: Navigation tool from M13 may still be visible on player or ground — proof of journey continuity
Temple doorway/threshold architecture echoes M13's 'discovered entrance'
Twilight-to-interior lighting gradient completes M13's deepening dusk
rationale: Push-up transition conveys threshold crossing and spatial shift (exterior→interior, low→elevated altar view) while maintaining POV consistency. Exit leaves player in motion with treasure secured, priming M15 for chase/escape sequence. Guard voices break M13's silence, fulfilling narrative promise. Callbacks anchor navigation success and location continuity.
